'''''Star Wars Weekly'' 112''' is the one hundred twelfth issue in the ''[[Star Wars Weekly]]'' series of comic reprints, published on [[April 16]], [[1980]]. It included the original story "[[A Creature in the Stars!]]".

==Contents==
*"[[A Creature in the Stars!]]"
*"Heroes of the galaxy: Monark Starstalker Part 2: In pursuit of Kurt Hammer!"
*"Deathlok the Demolisher Part 22: And once removed never"
*"Tales of the Watcher: The secret of the hidden planet!"
